hypothesis: If trained on the AIMNet2-optimized ChEMBL3D dataset and augmented with stereochemistry-encoding graph edges, the LoQI diffusion model will generate conformers for diverse drug-like molecules—including highly flexible and macrocyclic compounds—that preserve topology and stereochemistry while producing geometries and relative energies close to DFT-level minima (low RMSD to references and low relative/relaxation energies).
